Achillea millefolium L.

common yarrow

Asteraceae (Aster family)

USDA Species Characteristics

Blooming Period: Early Summer

Habitat / Range

Mesic to dry coastal bluffs, meadows, grasslands, rocky slopes and open forests in all vegetation zones; common throughout BC.

Source: The Illustrated Flora of British Columbia

Ecology

Elevation (metres) 0 189 2380

Soil Moisture Regime (SMR) [0 - very xeric; 4 - mesic; 8 - hydric] 3 4 8

Modal Nutrient Regime Class C

Modal BEC Zone Class IDF

All BEC Zones (# of stations/zone) species was recorded in: CDF(63), CWH(110), IDF(2274)

Status Information

Origin Status Provincial Status BC List COSEWIC

Native S5 (2019) Yellow Not Listed

Synonyms and Alternate Names

Achillea magna auct.

Achillea borealis Bong.

Recommended citation: Author, Date. Page title. In Klinkenberg, Brian. (Editor) 2023. E-Flora BC: Electronic Atlas of the Flora of British Columbia [eflora.bc.ca]. Lab for Advanced Spatial Analysis, Department of Geography, University of British Columbia, Vancouver.
